research_context.rationale: The dual-primary human adjudication model cannot be truthfully staffed by a single researcher. This profile supersedes the two-primary-plus-tie design with a disclosed solo-human adjudication model and a non-adjudicative AI tooling role.

immutability_policy: Freezing binds these raw bytes. Later change requires a superseding study-record and profile version linked to the prior digest.
unit_of_analysis: One predeclared term-contract row, distinction pair, organization-by-case encoding, or governance obligation evaluated against the exact subject and a frozen constructed case.

eligibility: Exactly one human research-lead adjudicator is named in the immutable execution intake.
The research-lead adjudicator is a human, not an AI agent or model inference process.
AI systems may assist only as non-adjudicative tooling: formatting, navigation, draft text proposals, packet generation. AI must not be recorded as the final coding authority for any rubric cell.

Because this is a solo-research profile, the research lead may also be protocol author and freeze authority if and only if every analysis is EXPLORATORY and dual-role disclosure is recorded in the intake and every finding.
The research lead must declare any prior exposure to case packets, peer codes (if any), or planned outputs before intake.
evaluator_roles.conflict_rule: Dual role (author/freeze authority AND adjudicator) is permitted only under this profile_version>=2 solo-research supersession, and only with EXPLORATORY analysis modes and explicit limitation language. It is not independent validation.
evaluator_roles.assignment_boundary: Personnel/tooling assignment occurs only after a valid freeze of this profile and before coding, via immutable execution intake bound to the exact frozen manifest digest.

procedure: Verify the subject, profile, category rules, cases, protocol, environment, configuration, and frozen manifest against their raw-byte SHA-256 values before any coding.

Before any case packet, planned output, or result access, publish and digest-lock the solo execution-intake payload plus external receipt naming the human research-lead adjudicator and disclosing AI tooling boundaries.
Generate evaluation packets using the deterministic ordering rule. Source-role blinding remains preferred when feasible for a solo coder; if blinding is incomplete, record the limitation.

For every assigned rubric cell, the human research lead records exactly one coding value, a citation to exact subject text, a case-fact citation, and a concise rationale. AI draft text may be used only if the human explicitly accepts or rewrites the final rationale and code.
Lock the single human ledger with a raw-byte digest before interpretation.
Do not compute two-coder Cohen's kappa; report single-coder completeness and explicit NON_ESTIMABLE inter-rater reliability.
Retain challenged, ambiguous, null, invalid, halted, and not-run outcomes.
Apply predeclared analysis-specific decision rules to the locked ledger; no result class automatically establishes claim support or rejection.
Publish at most one atomic finding or terminal disposition for each analysis ID under EXPLORATORY mode, then close out only with set equality across all five IDs.

necessarily_visible: the frozen method and coding rules
the case facts and evaluation prompts
blinding.solo_limitation: True dual-coder isolation is unavailable. Treat all results as exploratory structural self-application of the candidate by its research lead.

adjudication_method: Single human research-lead adjudicator codes all required cells and locks one raw-byte ledger. AI tooling may draft or format but must not cast final codes. No tie adjudicator. Inter-rater reliability is NOT_ESTIMABLE.
coverage_rule: Evaluate all exact candidate term IDs, declared observable distinctions, both candidate organizations on organization-targeted cases, every case in each frozen source, competency questions, and profile integrity constraints as bound by the frozen category rules. Missing, duplicate, or extra units invalidate the affected analysis.
unknown_policy: Use AMBIGUOUS when the exact subject and frozen facts permit multiple supported interpretations. Use INVALID_CASE only for malformed, contradictory, or non-evaluable case input. Never impute an omitted fact or force a favorable classification.
deviation_policy: Record the deviation before continuing. A deviation that changes a confirmatory input, metric, threshold, or decision rule halts the affected analysis and requires a superseding record; it cannot be repaired in place.

required_metrics: count of AMBIGUOUS and INVALID_CASE cells

output_requirements: A complete unit-level ledger with exact subject and case citations
One locked human ledger and raw-byte digest
Disclosure of AI tooling use and dual-role author/adjudicator status
A baseline comparison using matched rubric cells where defined
One analysis-scoped interpretation that states limitations and does not imply adoption or evidence maturity
interpretation_boundary: This profile can report bounded exploratory structural satisfaction, challenge, ambiguity, or invalidity only under solo self-application. It cannot establish inter-rater reliability, independent validation, category truth, completeness, external validity, safety, usefulness, implementation suitability, or any mechanism evidence label.
